title: Related IF/ELIF statements should not have the same condition
description: This rule checks if multiple IF/ELIF statements have the same condition, which can lead to code duplication and potential errors.
message: Multiple IF/ELIF statements have the same condition.
why_is_this_an_issue: Redundancy and potential errors in the code

logic.message_on_duplicate: Multiple IF/ELIF statements have the same condition.

metadata.title: Related IF/ELIF statements should not have the same condition
